action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of 2 models gave best mae_60min=3.3853. Time left ~1.14h, 12 iters. Analysis: Training a 3rd model takes ~22 min. With only 1.14h, I can fit one more train + eval (eval ~6s + run takes time too with prediction). Let me train a third diverse model with different seed and config, then ensemble 3. Decision: Train model C with different seed and slightly different layers config for diversity.
